tasks.description: Venue directory slugs must match the documented format: the venue name trimmed, lowercased, and with spaces replaced by hyphens. The current implementation never produces hyphens. Update the slug rule in internal/directory/slug.go accordingly; change nothing else.
Extend the venue slug unit tests in internal/directory: cover a name padded with tabs and spaces, and an all-uppercase name. Add tests only; do not change production code.

configurations.description: Bounded write agent (Module 3 loop) with a guided task prompt.
configurations.prompt_template:
{description}

Guidance: read the relevant files first, make the smallest change that satisfies the task, inspect your diff before finishing, and cover every case the task names.

configurations.description: Bounded write agent (Module 3 loop) with the bare task text.
